summary: Led SEO and organic growth across product, blog, and regional pages — scaling inbound traffic across English and Arabic search markets.
highlights: +61.7% growth in organic clicks (16.9K → 27.3K).
+57.9% growth in impressions (3.6M → 5.7M).
Average keyword position improved from 44.7 → 20.2 — a 24+ position lift.
45%+ of tracked keywords now rank in the Top 10; 160+ keywords in the Top 3.
Scaled multilingual SEO across EN + Arabic for MENA markets.
Built content clusters around WMS, OMS, inventory visibility, ERP & logistics workflows.

summary: Repositioned Omniful's POS from a feature-led product to a Unified Retail Operations Platform targeting complexity buyers, not volume buyers.
highlights: Reframed the market around upper-small and medium retailers (1.8% slice with outsized complexity).
Defined the new positioning: 'Unified Retail Operations Platform'.
Built the full messaging stack — ICP value props, battle cards, objection handling, demo flows, landing pages.
Identified 32 high-probability cross-sell accounts inside the existing base.
Aligned product, sales, and marketing under one narrative — and a 6-month north-star plan.

summary: Led content strategy and execution for a real estate brand — building a structured content pipeline across social and editorial channels.
highlights: Built and managed an end-to-end content pipeline and bi-weekly newsletters.
Contributed to 35% growth in Instagram followers.
Scripted and planned video content with production coordination — driving 40% increase in LinkedIn engagement.
Developed audience-first storytelling strategies and creative concepts.

summary: Owned product strategy, growth, and operations — turning client pain points into shippable digital solutions.
highlights: Led end-to-end development and launch of 15+ client websites and digital initiatives.
Improved advertising performance by ~15% through data-backed experimentation and campaign optimisation.
Managed a team of 6 across design, development, and marketing.
Built operational processes around communication, ownership, and execution.
Translated business requirements into actionable strategy and measurable outcomes.

summary: Built an analytics platform that generated actionable insights for e-commerce sellers — working directly with the CEO on strategic initiatives.
highlights: Contributed to a 20% increase in seller sales performance.
Analysed and visualised large datasets to uncover trends and unlock smarter business decisions.

summary: End-to-end social content planning and campaign execution across multiple client brands.
